ohtani.title: Machado, Tatis Jr. propel Padres to 5-2 win
ohtani.blurb: A three-run homer from Manny Machado and an RBI single from Fernando Tatis Jr. wrap up a 5-2 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: JJ Wetherholt's leadoff home run fuels Cardinals' win
imanaga.blurb: JJ Wetherholt's leadoff home run and Kyle Leahy's six strikeouts fuel Cardinals' 3-0 victory over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Nico Hoerner propels Cubs to 6-4 win over Cardinals
suzuki.blurb: Nico Hoerner drives in two runs, including the game-tying single to propel the Cubs over the Cardinals, 6-4

yoshida.title: Contreras, Duran homer in Red Sox's 7-5 win
yoshida.blurb: Willson Contreras and Jarren Duran hit home runs to power the Red Sox to a 7-5 win over the Angels

okamoto.title: Hancock throws seven scoreless in Mariners' 4-0 win
okamoto.blurb: Emerson Hancock throws a gem going seven scoreless and Mitch Garver's two-run homer propels Mariners' 4-0 victory over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Machado, Tatis Jr. propel Padres to 5-2 win
matsui.blurb: A three-run homer from Manny Machado and an RBI single from Fernando Tatis Jr. wrap up a 5-2 win over the Dodgers
